v.CNV: 你们要赞美耶和华。在正直人的议会中和大会里，我要全心称谢耶和华。
v.ESV: Praise the Lord ! I will give thanks to the Lord with my whole heart, in the company of the upright, in the congregation.
v.GAE: 할렐루야, 내가 정직한 자들의 모임과 회중 가운데에서 전심으로 여호와께 감사하리로다
v.KJV: Praise ye the LORD. I will praise the LORD with my whole heart, in the assembly of the upright, and in the congregation.
v.NASB: Praise the LORD! I will give thanks to the LORD with all my heart, In the company of the upright and in the assembly.
v.NIV: Praise the Lord . I will extol the Lord with all my heart in the council of the upright and in the assembly.
v.NRSV: Praise the LORD! I will give thanks to the LORD with my whole heart, in the company of the upright, in the congregation.
v.SAENEW: 할렐루야. 내가 온 마음을 다 기울여, 정직한 사람의 모임과 회중 가운데서 주님께 감사를 드리겠다.
v.WLB: 여호와를 찬양하라. 내가 정직한 사람들의 공회와 집회에서 내 온 마음을 다해 여호와를 찬양하리라.

v.CNV: 耶和华的作为伟大，喜爱他作为的人都努力查究。
v.ESV: Great are the works of the Lord , studied by all who delight in them.
v.GAE: 여호와께서 행하시는 일들이 크시오니 이를 즐거워하는 자들이 다 기리는도다
v.KJV: The works of the LORD are great, sought out of all them that have pleasure therein.
v.NASB: Great are the works of the LORD; They are studied by all who delight in them.
v.NIV: Great are the works of the Lord ; they are pondered by all who delight in them.
v.NRSV: Great are the works of the LORD, studied by all who delight in them.
v.SAENEW: 주님께서 하시는 일들은 참으로 훌륭하시니, 그 일을 보고 기뻐하는 사람들이 모두 깊이 연구하는구나.
v.WLB: 여호와께서 하시는 일이 위대하기에 그 일을 기뻐하는 사람들이 다 연구하는구나!

v.CNV: 他的作为满有尊荣和威严，他的公义永远长存。
v.ESV: Full of splendor and majesty is his work, and his righteousness endures forever.
v.GAE: 그의 행하시는 일이 존귀하고 엄위하며 그의 의가 영원히 서 있도다
v.KJV: His work is honourable and glorious: and his righteousness endureth for ever.
v.NASB: Splendid and majestic is His work, And His righteousness endures forever.
v.NIV: Glorious and majestic are his deeds, and his righteousness endures forever.
v.NRSV: Full of honor and majesty is his work, and his righteousness endures forever.
v.SAENEW: 주님이 하신 일은 장엄하고 영광스러우며, 주님의 의로우심은 영원하다.
v.WLB: 그분의 행적에 영광과 위엄이 있으며 그 의는 영원히 계속된다.

v.CNV: 他使人记念他所行的奇事；耶和华有恩典，有怜悯。
v.ESV: He has caused his wondrous works to be remembered; the Lord is gracious and merciful.
v.GAE: 그의 기적을 사람이 기억하게 하셨으니 여호와는 은혜로우시고 자비로우시도다
v.KJV: He hath made his wonderful works to be remembered: the LORD is gracious and full of compassion.
v.NASB: He has made His wonders to be remembered; The LORD is gracious and compassionate.
v.NIV: He has caused his wonders to be remembered; the Lord is gracious and compassionate.
v.NRSV: He has gained renown by his wonderful deeds; the LORD is gracious and merciful.
v.SAENEW: 그 하신 기이한 일들을 사람들에게 기억하게 하셨으니, 주님은 은혜로우시며 긍휼이 많으시다.
v.WLB: 그 기적들을 기억하게 하셨으니 여호와께서는 은혜롭고 자비가 넘치는 분이시다.

v.CNV: 他赐粮食给敬畏他的人；他永远记念自己的约。
v.ESV: He provides food for those who fear him; he remembers his covenant forever.
v.GAE: 여호와께서 자기를 경외하는 자들에게 양식을 주시며 그의 언약을 영원히 기억하시리로다
v.KJV: He hath given meat unto them that fear him: he will ever be mindful of his covenant.
v.NASB: He has given food to those who fear Him; He will remember His covenant forever.
v.NIV: He provides food for those who fear him; he remembers his covenant forever.
v.NRSV: He provides food for those who fear him; he is ever mindful of his covenant.
v.SAENEW: 주님은, 당신을 경외하는 사람들에게는 먹거리를 주시고, 당신이 맺으신 언약은 영원토록 기억하신다.
v.WLB: 그분은 자기를 경외하는 이들에게 양식을 주시며 그들과의 언약을 영원히 마음에 두신다.

v.CNV: 他向自己的子民彰显大能的作为，把列国赐给他们为业。
v.ESV: He has shown his people the power of his works, in giving them the inheritance of the nations.
v.GAE: 그가 그들에게 뭇 나라의 기업을 주사 그가 행하시는 일의 능력을 그들에게 알리셨도다
v.KJV: He hath shewed his people the power of his works, that he may give them the heritage of the heathen.
v.NASB: He has made known to His people the power of His works, In giving them the heritage of the nations.
v.NIV: He has shown his people the power of his works, giving them the lands of other nations.
v.NRSV: He has shown his people the power of his works, in giving them the heritage of the nations.
v.SAENEW: 당신의 백성에게 하신 일, 곧 뭇 민족의 유산을 그들에게 주신 일로 당신의 능력을 알리셨다.
v.WLB: 그 백성들에게 일하시는 능력을 보여 주시어 이방 민족들의 유산을 주기까지 하신다.

v.CNV: 他手所作的都是诚实和公正；他的训词都是可信靠的。
v.ESV: The works of his hands are faithful and just; all his precepts are trustworthy;
v.GAE: 그의 손이 하는 일은 진실과 정의이며 그의 법도는 다 확실하니
v.KJV: The works of his hands are verity and judgment; all his commandments are sure.
v.NASB: The works of His hands are truth and justice; All His precepts are sure.
v.NIV: The works of his hands are faithful and just; all his precepts are trustworthy.
v.NRSV: The works of his hands are faithful and just; all his precepts are trustworthy.
v.SAENEW: 손수 하신 일들은 진실하고 공의로우며, 주님이 지시하신 법은 모두 든든하며,
v.WLB: 그 손으로 하시는 일들은 참되고 공의롭고 그 법도는 다 믿을 수 있다.

v.CNV: 他的训词是永远确定的，是按着信实和正直制订的。
v.ESV: they are established forever and ever, to be performed with faithfulness and uprightness.
v.GAE: 영원무궁토록 정하신 바요 진실과 정의로 행하신 바로다
v.KJV: They stand fast for ever and ever, and are done in truth and uprightness.
v.NASB: They are upheld forever and ever; They are performed in truth and uprightness.
v.NIV: They are established for ever and ever, enacted in faithfulness and uprightness.
v.NRSV: They are established forever and ever, to be performed with faithfulness and uprightness.
v.SAENEW: 영원토록 흔들리는 일이 없으니, 진실과 정직으로 제정되었다.
v.WLB: 그것들이 진리와 정직함으로 된 일이니 영원토록 굳건히 서 있을 것이다.

v.CNV: 他向自己的子民施行救赎；他命定自己的约，直到永远；他的名神圣可畏。
v.ESV: He sent redemption to his people; he has commanded his covenant forever. Holy and awesome is his name!
v.GAE: 여호와께서 그의 백성을 속량하시며 그의 언약을 영원히 세우셨으니 그의 이름이 거룩하고 지존하시도다
v.KJV: He sent redemption unto his people: he hath commanded his covenant for ever: holy and reverend is his name.
v.NASB: He has sent redemption to His people; He has ordained His covenant forever; Holy and awesome is His name.
v.NIV: He provided redemption for his people; he ordained his covenant forever— holy and awesome is his name.
v.NRSV: He sent redemption to his people; he has commanded his covenant forever. Holy and awesome is his name.
v.SAENEW: 당신의 백성에게 구원을 베푸시고 그 언약을 영원히 세우셨으니, 그 이름이 거룩하고 두렵다.
v.WLB: 그분이 백성들에게 구원을 보내 주셨고 언약에 명령해 영원하라고 하셨으니 그 이름이 거룩하고 위대하다.

v.CNV: 敬畏耶和华是智慧的开端；凡是这样行的都是明智的。耶和华该受赞美，直到永远。
v.ESV: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom; all those who practice it have a good understanding. His praise endures forever!
v.GAE: 여호와를 경외함이 지혜의 근본이라 그의 계명을 지키는 자는 다 훌륭한 지각을 가진 자이니 여호와를 찬양함이 영원히 계속되리로다
v.KJV: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom: a good understanding have all they that do his commandments: his praise endureth for ever.
v.NASB: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; A good understanding have all those who do His commandments; His praise endures forever.
v.NIV: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom; all who follow his precepts have good understanding. To him belongs eternal praise.
v.NRSV: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; all those who practice it have a good understanding. His praise endures forever.
v.SAENEW: 주님을 경외하는 것이 지혜의 근본이다. 주님의 계명을 지키는 사람은 바른 깨달음을 얻으니, 영원토록 주님을 찬양할 일이다.
v.WLB: 여호와를 경외하는 것이 지혜의 근본이니 그 계명을 따르는 사람들은 다 훌륭한 통찰력이 있어 영원히 여호와를 찬양할 것이다.
